name: hospital-management
description: Hospital Management System — Node.js + MongoDB + React

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.build: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.vercel-build: npm install --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix frontend
